title: Iran threatens retaliation after U.S. strikes in southern Iran
summary_full: The attacks prompted Tehran to warn that it would “leave no act of hostility unanswered,” complicating negotiations to end the war.
summary_public: The attacks prompted Tehran to warn that it would “leave no act of hostility unanswered,” complicating negotiations to end the war.
